steps.title: Identify the decay factor
steps.content: If the mass decreases by 23%, then 77% of the mass remains after each 11.69-minute period. The decay factor is 0.77.

steps.title: Build the exponential decay model
steps.content:
For exponential decay, the exponent $t/T$ represents the number of periods elapsed, where $T$ is the length of one period.
Substituting $M_0 = 100$, $b = 0.77$, and $T = 11.69$:
$$M = 100(0.77)^{t/11.69}$$
This is choice A — A is correct.
